channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Congressman says Israeli settlers detained him in West Bank
item.description: Congressman Ro Khanna reported that Israeli Defense Forces interacted with settlers and blocked the road with a car.

item.title: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner ends campaign
item.description: Graham Platner has officially exited the Maine Senate race as of Friday.

item.title: Exclusive deals featured on CBS Mornings Deals
item.description: This edition of CBS Mornings Deals highlights products to improve daily life. Visit cbsdeals.com for these offers.

item.title: Iran live updates: Khamenei vows revenge for his father's death
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
